name: Pretzel Kids' Decorative Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Style their space with this Pretzel Kids' Decorative Pillow from Pillowfort™. Made from 100% recycled polyester, this decorative pillow is designed as a pretzel in a brown hue for a realistic touch. Stuffed with 100% polyester fiber for soft cushioning, this pretzel pillow is tailored in a sewn-seam closure for a polished look. You can place it on the sofa, chair, bed, or any other indoor item to create a fun-themed room.
